docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KARNETT, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT MEDICANN, INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
